news.t: Invesco Launches New Quality Value & Momentum Multi-factor ETF Suite

holdings.infoBox: QVMM is an equity ETF with a total of 360 individual holdings. The top holdings are Flex Ltd. stock at 1.57%, nVent Electric at 0.83%, Curtiss-Wright at 0.83%, TechnipFMC at 0.81%, and Twilio at 0.81%.

overview.description: The Invesco S&P MidCap 400 QVM Multi-factor ETF (QVMM) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in mid cap equity. The fund tracks a market cap-weighted index of US mid-cap stocks that exhibit strong quality, value, and momentum based on a multi-factor score. QVMM was launched on Jun 30, 2021 and is issued by Invesco.
infoTable: S&P MidCap 400 Quality, Value & Momentum Top 90% Multi-factor Index

data.title: Invesco Launches New Quality Value & Momentum Multi-factor ETF Suite
data.text: ATLANTA, July 12, 2021 /PRNewswire/ -- Invesco Ltd. (NYSE: IVZ), a leading global asset management firm, today announced the launch of a new multi-factor ETF suite tracking the S&P Quality Value & Mom...
